title: Farmer's Cutting: BetterEnd
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for BetterEnd
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
> Also supports these unofficial [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend-forge) and [NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend-neoforge) ports of BetterEnd for use with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all (applicable) wood types
- More dye from one block high flora that give dye
- Smaragdant crystals can be broken down into shards

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ROV8mPB1/images/79d09ff547f235b3632cf79e525a045631d4e45a.png) ![Flora Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ROV8mPB1/images/c02b1fd21bfd5fec23e5cb260135efa8e32d3b13.png) ![Smaragdant Breakdown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ROV8mPB1/images/04ddb12b691a1affd9c297d4f378e2b85ba0a060.png)
